summary: Final research.md synthesis written. It consolidates all ten answered questions into a contract-first, renderer-first implementation plan: shared payload contract, freshness/source cache, producer/cache policy, renderer/regression harness, Claude first runtime slice, Gemini/Copilot parity, Codex hook-policy parity, and documentation/release contract.

Final synthesis recommends first shippable slice 002->003->004->005->006, with 007 Gemini/Copilot and 008 Codex deferred from first slice but required before all-runtime parity claims, and 009 documentation required for release.

Final synthesis assigns the full 019/004 200-prompt parity and timing run to 005-advisor-renderer-and-regression-harness, preserving iteration 003 bounded measurement as architecture evidence but not release validation.

research.md is written and iteration 009 adds no new architecture discovery, but the configured last-three-ratios stop condition is not satisfied because iterations 007 and 008 remain above 0.05. Keep status in_progress and reserve iteration 010 for formal closeout or child-scaffold decision.
